creator: pmc@citylink.dinoex.sub.org
text:
(In reply to Eugene Grosbein from comment #18)

I did some digging in my git log. My first try, that did crash, had a flaw. 
The second try, that just got the system stuck offline (we don't know why, might be anything) should probably have worked, but it didn't bother to reserve an extra variable to return the result from UseLink().
So Your *first* patch is still cleaner than that - and that runs now on my KVM, and up to now it works.
